Somali (current): Waxaan mar u baahanahay inaan soo dejino alaabtaada, macaamiishaada, iyo wax iibinta dhowaan ka hor inta aanad shaqayn karin marka aad offline-tahay. Fur Wi-Fi ama internet-ka taleefanka, ka dibna taabo MAR KALE.

Somali (current): Waxaa la soo dejinayaa alaabtaada, macaamiishaada, iyo dhaqdhaqaaqyada dhowaan. Tani hal mar ayey dhacaysaa.

English: ⚠ Working offline since {time}. Tap to retry sync.
Somali (current): ⚠ Offline tan iyo {time}. Taabo si aad mar kale isku daydid.

English: {count, plural, =0{Already up to date} =1{Synced 1 update} other{Synced {count} updates}}
Somali (current): {count, plural, =0{Horeyba u cusub} =1{1 cusboonaysiis la diray} other{{count} cusboonaysiis la diray}}
Lama is-waafajin karin — mar kale isku day.
